title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:
ion.
October 3, 2019
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Three new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus
Obesity Screening Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibodies (ANCA) Test Opioid Testing 
September 27, 2019
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Fifteen new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Test Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Isoenzymes Test Ammonia Levels Prolactin Levels Ceruloplasmin Test Natriuretic Peptide Tests (BNP, NT-proBNP) Parathyroid Hormone (PTH) Test Lactic Acid Test 17-Hydroxyprogesterone Smooth Muscle Antibody (SMA) Test Cord Blood Testing and Banking Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (CMP) Adrenocorticotropic Hormone (ACTH) Liver Function Tests Creatinine Test 
September 13, 2019
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Five new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Helicobacter Pylori (H. Pylori) Tests Â  C. Diff Testing Pleural Fluid Analysis Â  
Follicle-Stimulating Hormone (FSH) Levels Test Â  Luteinizing Hormone (LH) Levels Test 
August 30, 2019
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Five new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Magnesium Blood Test 
Creatine Kinase 
Phosphate in Blood 
Troponin Test 
Ova and Parasite Tests 
August 28, 2019
Health Topics Name Changes
The following health topics have new topic names:
